rulings.Case Title: CHARLES ZETTNER et al VS. BUFFALO PUMPS INC(SUED INDIVIDULLY AND AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, July 7, 2008, line 2. DEFENDANT CRANE CO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Failure to sustain burden of proof. Plaintiff identifies working with and around defendant's products. The motion for summary adjudication is granted as to issues 19 and 20. Denied as to the others for failure to shift burden of proof and/or where the issue fails to resolve an entire cause of action. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES ZETTNER et al VS. BUFFALO PUMPS INC(SUED INDIVIDULLY AND AS et al

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES ZETTNER et al VS. BUFFALO PUMPS INC(SUED INDIVIDULLY AND AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, July 7, 2008, line 2. DEFENDANT GOULDS PUMPS, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Failure to sustain burden of proof. Plaintiff describes exposure to defendant's product at 994-1004 of his deposition. Defendant's separate statement does not comply with the Rules of Court for defendant does not identify specific interrogatories. Summary Adjudication is denied because defendant's interrogatories do not seek evidence as to distinct causes of action. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: KATHARINA SAGHI VS. PAUL ERIC BALUYOT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Determine Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, July 7, 2008, line 3. DEFENDANT WAHEED HAIDARI'S Motion To Determine Good Faith Settlement is off calendar. No proof of service. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: PATSY R LOSS et al VS. ALFA LAVAL( SUED INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, July 7, 2008, line 4. DEFENDANT GOULDS PUMPS, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant failed to shift burden of proof. The Katherman deposition is evidence of decedent's exposure to defendant's product. Defendant does not shift the burden for special interrogatory is inadequate to establish a basis that plaintiff lacks evidence as to whether the pumps contained original or replacement parts. Defendant fails to comply with Rules of Court by failing to identify specific interrogatory responses that are inadequate. Motion for summary adjudication is denied for failure to direct discovery to distinct causes of action. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH KOSICH et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, July 7, 2008, line 5. DEFENDANT MAREMONT CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Plaintiff's discovery responses on plaintiff's deposition testimony is not factually devoid. If it were, triable issue of fact are created by the declarations of Roach, Cohen and Kosich. Motion for summary adjudication is granted as to market share theory, misrepresentation claim and punitive damages. Defendant shifted the burden of proof and plaintiff did not create a triable issue of fact. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. GERALD PRENDERGAST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, July 7, 2008, line 14. DEFENDANT GERALD PRENDERGAST'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Failure to sustain burden of proof for lack of admissible evidence as to defendant's condition. Further, it has not been shown that defendant's condition is a defense in this case to plaintiff's claim. =(302/PJM/VC)
